title: CrabLaw-CN Regulatory Policy Item
description: A single PRC statute / regulation / rule / normative document tracked by the regulatory and AI-governance plugins (consumed by policy-diff, gap analysis, and policy-monitor). Filing/comment deadlines are NOT stored here; they are compliance-deadline records (obligationType=regulatory-filing).

issuer.description: 发文机关 (issuing authority), e.g. 国家网信办.

documentNumber.description: 文号, e.g. 国家互联网信息办公室令第15号.

effectiveLevel.description: Legal hierarchy. law=法律; administrative-regulation=行政法规; departmental-rule=部门规章; local-regulation=地方性法规; local-government-rule=地方政府规章; normative-document=规范性文件; national-standard=国家标准; industry-standard=行业标准; other=其他

domain.description: Regulatory domain, e.g. 数据安全 / 广告 / 金融 / 生成式AI.

status.description: draft-for-comment=征求意见稿; published=已公布未施行; effective=施行中; amended=已修订; repealed=已废止; superseded=被取代; other=其他

sourceRef.description: Pointer to the governing source; required when citationTag is [已核验-来源].
